strengths: Extensive full-stack expertise heavily featuring the required primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) across multiple senior and staff-level roles.
Direct, recent experience with AI agent development, specifically building MCP code generators and agentic workflows at re:cinq.
Exceptional testing and software craftsmanship background, evidenced by applying TDD at RIDE Capital and teaching Selenium and testing workshops.
concerns: Lacks explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest, which are specific requirements in the primary stack.
Missing experience with Kotlin and Python, though he does have Java experience from his time at Altom Consulting.
Significant historical focus on DLang, which is a niche language irrelevant to this specific tech stack.
response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptionally strong candidate who easily exceeds the 6+ years of required experience. He demonstrates deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, which form the core of the primary stack. Crucially, his current role at re:cinq provides direct, hands-on experience with AI agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) workflows, perfectly aligning with the job's niche AI requirements. Furthermore, his strong advocacy for software craftsmanship—evidenced by his use of TDD at RIDE Capital and his history of teaching software testing—proves his ability to build reliable, high-quality solutions. While he lacks explicit mentions of Nest.js and Vitest, his profound testing background and mastery of the JavaScript/TypeScript ecosystem make this a very minor concern. He is highly recommended for an interview.
